ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "election_office_address" TEXT /* Address of the county election office */,
  "election_office_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the county election office */,
  "election_office_email" TEXT /* Email address of the county election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_party_affiliation" TEXT /* Candidate's party affiliation (e.g., Democrat, Republican) */,
  "campaign_email" TEXT /* Email address of the candidate's campaign */,
  "campaign_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the candidate's campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "election_description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "voting_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "voting_method_description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voting_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate receiving the vote */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county where the vote was cast */,
  "voting_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "vote_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes cast for the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_voting_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("voting_method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("voting_method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "winner_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the candidate won the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "turnout_percentage" REAL /* Voter turnout percentage for the county */,
  "total_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of voters in the county */,
  "eligible_voters" INTEGER /* Total number of eligible voters in the county */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the official */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the official (e.g., administrator, poll worker) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the official (e.g., elections office, county clerk) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., election official, candidate) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election affected by the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change made (e.g., vote update, candidate addition) */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., vote share, turnout percentage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_analytics_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_analytics_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_reports_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "polling_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling station */,
  "station_address" TEXT /* Address of the polling station */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polling_stations_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)
